_note: 9.3-05 context-compiler selftest fixture (D-9.3-07). Self-contained: a task + a pinned commit + a mini catalog + note pointers, so `sma context --selftest` double-compiles IN PROCESS on any machine, byte-compares PACK.md + MANIFEST.json, and prints 1 — no repo state touched. Cards use empty git.lastCommit so the pack carries no timestamp (determinism is the feature).
